potion_effect_domains.name: Mild Bodily Improvement
potion_effect_domains.description: Makes the drinker feel slightly healthier and more put-together, without any dramatic changes.

potion_effect_domains.name: Questionable Athleticism
potion_effect_domains.description: Improves physical movement in a way that feels impressive but may not be technically optimal.

potion_effect_domains.name: Dubious Confidence
potion_effect_domains.description: Creates a strong sense of self-belief, regardless of actual skill or preparation.

potion_effect_domains.name: Over-Enunciation
potion_effect_domains.description: Causes speech to become unusually clear, deliberate, and oddly formal.

potion_effect_domains.name: Excessive Balance
potion_effect_domains.description: Greatly improves steadiness and posture, even in unnecessary situations.

potion_effect_domains.name: Polite Vitality
potion_effect_domains.description: Restores energy in a calm, considerate, and non-alarming way.

potion_effect_domains.name: Unnecessary Alertness
potion_effect_domains.description: Sharpens awareness beyond what the situation reasonably demands.

potion_effect_domains.name: Subtle Glow
potion_effect_domains.description: Surrounds the drinker with a faint, flattering light.

potion_effect_domains.name: Unnatural Cleanliness
potion_effect_domains.description: Prevents dirt, dust, and mess from sticking for a short time.

potion_effect_domains.name: Heroic Posture
potion_effect_domains.description: Improves stance and bearing, making the drinker look quietly impressive.

potion_effect_domains.name: Impressive Sneezing Control
potion_effect_domains.description: Grants unusual mastery over sneezes and sniffles.

potion_effect_domains.name: Minor Reality Cooperation
potion_effect_domains.description: Encourages small coincidences to work in the drinker’s favor.

potion_effect_domains.name: Enhanced Snack Enjoyment
potion_effect_domains.description: Makes food taste slightly better and more satisfying than expected.

potion_effect_domains.name: Cartoon Physics (Light)
potion_effect_domains.description: Softens minor impacts and makes movement feel bouncier.

potion_effect_domains.name: Temporary Handsomeness
potion_effect_domains.description: Improves perceived attractiveness in a vague and subjective way.

potion_effect_domains.name: Overly Specific Motivation
potion_effect_domains.description: Creates strong motivation to complete one particular task.

potion_effect_domains.name: Audible Determination
potion_effect_domains.description: Adds subtle, encouraging sound effects to movement and actions.

potion_effect_domains.name: Mood Stabilization
potion_effect_domains.description: Smooths emotional highs and lows into a steady, calm state.

potion_effect_domains.name: Mild Bravery
potion_effect_domains.description: Encourages small acts of courage and reduced hesitation.

potion_effect_domains.name: Stylish Sweating
potion_effect_domains.description: Causes perspiration to appear neat, subtle, or pleasantly scented.

potion_effect_domains.name: Improved Hand Gestures
potion_effect_domains.description: Enhances communication through clearer and more expressive gestures.

potion_effect_domains.name: Cartoon Appetite
potion_effect_domains.description: Causes hunger to appear suddenly and disappear just as fast.

potion_effect_domains.name: Temporary Main Character Energy
potion_effect_domains.description: Gives the feeling of being briefly important to the story of the world.

potion_effect_domains.name: Overconfidence in Directions
potion_effect_domains.description: Creates certainty about navigation, whether correct or not.

potion_effect_domains.name: Excessively Warm Vibes
potion_effect_domains.description: Radiates friendliness and comfort to nearby people.

potion_effect_domains.name: Mild Time Awareness
potion_effect_domains.description: Improves estimation of how long things will take.

potion_effect_domains.name: Enhanced Tidying Instinct
potion_effect_domains.description: Creates a desire to straighten, organize, and align objects.

potion_effect_domains.name: Overly Sincere Compliments
potion_effect_domains.description: Encourages genuine and frequent positive remarks about others.

potion_effect_domains.name: Impressive Sitting Down
potion_effect_domains.description: Makes the act of sitting appear smooth, confident, and deliberate.

potion_effect_domains.name: Sensible Risk-Taking
potion_effect_domains.description: Encourages bold decisions that remain mostly reasonable.

potion_effect_domains.name: Unnatural Hair Cooperation
potion_effect_domains.description: Causes hair to behave exactly as intended for a time.

potion_effect_domains.name: Sudden Hobby Interest
potion_effect_domains.description: Creates brief fascination with a harmless activity or pastime.

potion_effect_domains.name: Improved Coin Flipping
potion_effect_domains.description: Slightly biases chance outcomes toward intended results.

potion_effect_domains.name: Ambient Encouragement
potion_effect_domains.description: Produces a vague sense that someone believes in you.

potion_effect_domains.name: Overly Accurate Estimation
potion_effect_domains.description: Improves guesses about size, distance, and quantity.

potion_effect_domains.name: Mild Heroic Music
potion_effect_domains.description: Creates an internal sense of dramatic background music.

potion_effect_domains.name: Enhanced Doorway Navigation
potion_effect_domains.description: Prevents awkward bumps when passing through tight spaces.

potion_effect_domains.name: Unnecessary Grace
potion_effect_domains.description: Makes simple actions look smooth and practiced.

potion_effect_domains.name: Excessive Hydration Awareness
potion_effect_domains.description: Strongly reminds the drinker to drink water.

potion_effect_domains.name: Cartoon Luck
potion_effect_domains.description: Reduces small annoyances and minor mishaps.

potion_effect_domains.name: Improved Waiting Patience
potion_effect_domains.description: Makes delays and queues feel shorter and more tolerable.

potion_effect_domains.name: Temporary Wisdom
potion_effect_domains.description: Allows surprisingly good advice and insights.

potion_effect_domains.name: Overconfidence in Hats
potion_effect_domains.description: Makes any hat feel like a perfect fashion choice.

potion_effect_domains.name: Mild Plot Armor
potion_effect_domains.description: Causes embarrassing outcomes to narrowly fail to occur.

potion_effect_domains.name: Enthusiastic Nod Reflex
potion_effect_domains.description: Triggers supportive nodding at appropriate moments.

potion_effect_domains.name: Enhanced Book Opening
potion_effect_domains.description: Books tend to fall open to useful or interesting pages.

potion_effect_domains.name: Unnatural Organizational Insight
potion_effect_domains.description: Provides a strong sense of where things belong.

potion_effect_domains.name: Gentle Self-Satisfaction
potion_effect_domains.description: Creates a quiet, contented feeling of adequacy.

potion_effect_domains.name: Subtle Aura of Competence
potion_effect_domains.description: Makes others assume the drinker knows what they are doing.

potion_effect_domains.name: Harmless Destiny Alignment
potion_effect_domains.description: Encourages outcomes to work out acceptably well.
